THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINEDA, FREDY E PINEDA, ELVIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, VICTOR DANILO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2697 BRYANT STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JAN-14-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC. PLTF'S WAIVE BACK RENT THROUGH 1/14/03. SEC DEP. TO BE HANDLED PER CIVIL CDE. 1950.5. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COST AND FEES. IF DEFT. PAYS TO PLTF. $316.12 ON OR BEFORE 1/1/03, PLTF'S. ATTY SHALL NOTIFY THE SHERIFF THAT THER SHALL BE A FURTHER STAY UNTIL 5:00 P.M. ON 1/21/03. THEREAFTER, NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE ADDITIONAL TERMS IN SCANNED DOC. MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gilliam. Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. appeared for Plaintiffs, Fredy E. Pineda and Elvia Pineda. Defendant, Victor Danilo Rivera appeared in pro per. The matter settled per stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
